cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation

cards.name: 2 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk

cards.name: 3 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: teamwork, shared goals, collaboration, apprenticeship, effort, pooling energy
